PowerShell($msg = "feat: add Publicaciones section with article preview and filters`n`nNew /publicaciones page shows all generated articles \(RSS + email\).`nCard list with preview modal, WP link, filters by source and category.`n`nCo-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>")

PowerShell($msg = "fix: humanize article writing style in Groq prompts`n`nReplace rigid H2/list structure with natural journalistic prose.`nBan subtitles, bullet lists, conclusion sections and AI-sounding`ntransition phrases. Only

and sparse allowed.`nRaise temperature to 0.85 for more varied output.`n`nCo-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 ")

PowerShell($msg = "fix: add Policiales category, enforce 20-word summary, improve readability`n`n- Added Policiales to category list in both prompts \(was missing, causing`n  crime articles to fall back to General\)`n- Summary now requires EXACTLY 20 words in prompt + Python normalizer`n  that trims/extends to 18-22 words as safety net`n- Subtitles: h2 only when article covers 2+ distinct topics, forbidden`n  for short single-topic articles`n- Readability: target 95pct Flesch, max 20-word sentences, plain vocab`n- Banned: cabe destacar, por otro lado, a continuacion and similar AI tells`n`nCo-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>")

PowerShell($msg = "fix: normalize naive datetimes from SQLite before UTC comparison`n`nSQLite returns last_checked_at without tzinfo; comparing with`ndatetime.now\(utc\) raised offset-naive vs offset-aware TypeError.`nFix: attach UTC tzinfo when tzinfo is None before arithmetic.`n`nCo-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>")
PowerShell(git add app/models.py app/main.py app/worker.py app/services/wordpress_service.py app/templates/publicaciones.html)

PowerShell($msg = "fix: auto-create WP category if missing + show RSS source name in panel`n`n- get_or_create_category: if category not found in WP, create it via API`n  so articles never fall back to default Generales category`n- Post.source_name: new column stores feed name for RSS articles`n- publicaciones.html: shows feed name badge on each article card`n- Migration: auto-adds source_name column to posts table on startup`n`nCo-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>")
